title: Usage of the 'this' Keyword in Java
description: A flowchart demonstrating the primary uses and decision points for employing the 'this' keyword within instance methods and constructors.
relationships: 'this' is used to resolve ambiguity between instance variables and local variables/parameters
'this' is used to pass the current object as a parameter to another method
'this' is used to call another constructor from within a constructor (must be first line)
